creator: spcoltri@omcl.org
text:
devel/SWIG/patches contains three patches against older versions which
have been integrated into the current version; their presence now causes
'make patch' to fail.

Fix: 

Remove patch-ad, patch-ae and patch-af from devel/SWIG/patches .
How-To-Repeat: cd ports/devel/SWIG && make
